# Fixture: benign-readme-01.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
## Installation

1. Install Rust 1.75 or later
2. Clone the repository: `git clone https://github.com/rigor-cloud/rigor`
3. Build: `cargo build --release`
4. Run: `./target/release/rigor serve`

The proxy listens on port 8080 by default. Configure via `rigor.yaml`.
